test.name: UAT-ReportFail-004 Passenger Report and upload image 4 file

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[contains(@class,'w-full')]' by value PASSENGER_ISSUE.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ขับรถแย่มาก ฝ่าไปแดง ขับเร็ว ขับส่ายไปส่ายมา' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\pexels-hazardos-804.jpg to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\pexels-hazardos-8041.jpg to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\pexels-hazardos-80412.jpg to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\pexels-hazardos-804129.jpg to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รายงานปัญหา'.
kw.arg: รายงานปัญหา
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"เพิ่มรูปได้สูงสุด 3 รูป")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: UAT-ReportFail-005 Passenger Report and do not select topic

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.

kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ขับรถแย่มาก ฝ่าไปแดง ขับเร็ว ขับส่ายไปส่ายมา' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รายงานปัญหา'.
kw.arg: รายงานปัญหา
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Disabled
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ส่งรายงานความปลอดภัย')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

test.name: UAT-ReportFail-006 Passenger Report and do not fill report detail
